name: Artichoke/Spinach Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop artichoke hearts in a food processor fitted with a steel blade.
2. Set aside the chopped artichoke hearts.
3. Wash spinach well and blanch in boiling water, then drain and squeeze dry.
4. Chop the spinach in the same food processor.
5. Add the chopped artichoke hearts and remaining ingredients to the food processor.
6. Process until blended.
7. Prepare the dip a day in advance.
8. Serve with vegetable sticks.
Yield: 2 1/2 cups
